test_cases.name: Fonts and Material Icons load from local origin on ${template}

steps.action: Open ${template} in Chrome with DevTools > Network tab filtered by 'font' (clear cache before loading)
steps.data:
Styleweb: ${template}
Valid values: egypt1, egypt2, egyptontrailuk, egyptseo, egyptseo2, egyptseo3
steps.expected_result: Every font file request (woff2/woff/ttf/otf) is served from the same origin as ${template} (or the project's own CDN). No requests go to fonts.googleapis.com, fonts.gstatic.com, or any external font host.

steps.action: In the Network tab, filter by 'material' and 'icons' to check Material Icons source
steps.expected_result: Material Icons assets (font file and/or CSS) are served locally from ${template}. No requests to fonts.googleapis.com/icon or similar external icon hosts.

test_cases.name: Page HTML on ${template} no longer references external font/icon hosts

steps.action: View source of ${template} entry page and search for external font hosts
steps.data: Terms to search: fonts.googleapis.com, fonts.gstatic.com, cdn.fonts, material-icons CDN
steps.expected_result: No <link>, @import, or @font-face src references point to external font/icon hosts. All @font-face rules use relative or same-origin URLs.

test_cases.name: Regression - Visual rendering of fonts is unchanged on ${template}

steps.action: Compare ${template} application flow (landing, application form, confirm, thank-you) before and after the refactor
steps.data:
Baseline: screenshots from the pre-change build of ${template}
Comparison: latest build on test env
steps.expected_result: Font family, weight, size, line-height, and letter-spacing look identical to baseline. No fallback/Times New Roman flashes. No layout shifts caused by different metrics.

steps.action: Inspect computed styles on a representative heading and body paragraph on ${template}
steps.expected_result: The first font in the font-family list resolves to the locally hosted font (no fallback in use for the primary text).

test_cases.name: Regression - Material Icons render correctly across ${template} flow

steps.action: Navigate every screen on ${template} that shows icons (navbar, form inputs, modals, CTA buttons, footer, toasts)
steps.data: Screens: home, application form, payment, profile, confirmation, language selector
steps.expected_result: All icons render with their correct glyph. No missing-glyph squares, no 'content: ...' literal text visible, no broken icon placeholders.

steps.action: Block fonts.googleapis.com and fonts.gstatic.com via DevTools > Network > 'Block request domain', then reload ${template}
steps.expected_result: Page renders fully with the intended typography and icons. No broken glyphs; no console errors referencing blocked font hosts.

test_cases.name: Console is clean on key pages of ${template}

steps.action: Open the key pages of ${template} (home, application, payment, confirmation) with DevTools open and watch the console
steps.expected_result: No 404s for font or icon assets. No warnings about 'missing font' or 'preloaded font not used'. No new errors introduced by the change.
